name: Greg Locke
role: Lead Pastor, Global Vision Bible Church, Mount Juliet, Tennessee
incident: Greg Locke, who had preached extensively that divorce is sinful and publicly condemned other pastors for remarrying after divorce, divorced his wife of 21 years and married his church secretary within the same year. Locke had previously called out fellow pastors on social media for moral failures related to marriage and divorce, writing publicly that leaders must be held to a higher standard.
